title: feat(openapi): refine API key auth proxy and app isolation
known_problem: OpenAPI auth change touches app, service, global, docs, and private pro. Guard pro and run focused OpenAPI tests.

commands.name: pro_submodule_guard
commands.shell: test -e pro || (echo 'private pro submodule is required for this PR' >&2; exit 2)
commands.reason: This PR changes private pro state; do not produce false positives without it.

commands.name: service_openapi_auth_test
commands.shell: pnpm exec vitest run test/support/openapi/auth.test.ts -c vitest.config.ts
commands.reason: Run focused OpenAPI auth service test.

commands.name: app_openapi_tests
commands.reason: Run focused app OpenAPI API tests.

commands.name: prepare_sdks
commands.reason: Rebuild generated SDK dist files after git clean before app build.

commands.name: build_projects_app
commands.reason: OpenAPI app API/UI must compile through app build.
